name: Ranah Pusaka
overview: The three rebels, Kali, Badran, and Ilyas, who live in a boarding house, tasked by its owner, Arka, to find a hidden heirloom. In exchange for free rent, they agree to search the house, a task that forces them to confront their own desires for freedom and inadvertently reveal their deepest secrets to each other.

trailers.title: Ranah Pusaka | Trailer | Vonny Felicia, Fahad Haydra, Alif Rivelino, Ryuken Lie
